macro.name: MAX_NORMAL_PKG_LENGTH
macro.desc: Maximum length of unencrypted message packets

macro.name: CS_MAX_ROLE_NUM
macro.desc: Maximum number of characters per account

macro.name: CS_MAX_ROLE_APPEAR_NUM
macro.desc: Maximum number of nearby appearing players at once

macro.name: CS_MAX_BONE_NAME
macro.desc: Maximum monster part bone name length

macro.name: CS_MAX_ATTACKPOS_NUM_MAX
macro.desc: Maximum number of monster attack targets

macro.name: CS_MAX_PART_TEMPLATE
macro.desc: Maximum monster part template name length

macro.name: CS_MAX_AG_MELEE_EVENT_STR_SIZE
macro.desc: Max string length in AG Melee Event parameters

macro.name: CS_MAX_ATTACK_INFO_STR_SIZE
macro.desc: Max string length in AttackInfo parameters

macro.name: CS_MAX_BB_STRING_VALUE_LEN
macro.desc: Max string value length in BlackBoard

macro.name: CS_MAX_LENGTH_FOR_OBJ_STATENAME
macro.desc: Max length for scene interactive object state name

macro.name: CS_MAX_REGION_JUMP_TRIGGER_NAME
macro.desc: Maximum region jump trigger name length

macro.name: CS_MAX_CALCULATEPARAMETER_LEN
macro.desc: Damage calculation parameter return data length

macro.name: CS_MAX_SO_USER_DATA_LEN
macro.desc: Scene object sync message user data length

macro.name: MAX_INSTANCE_REWARD_ITEM_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum reward item types per reward category

macro.name: CS_MAX_SENSITIVE_VERIFY_URL_LEN
macro.desc: Maximum sensitive operation verification URL length

macro.name: CS_MAX_IP_STRING_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum configured IPs for multi-line datacenter, including domain

macro.name: ROLE_EQUIPED_MAX_NETMESSAGE
macro.desc: Maximum equipped items when displaying player list and other player info

macro.name: CS_MAX_HUNTER_STAR_LEVEL_LEN
macro.desc: Maximum hunter star level info length

macro.name: CS_MAX_PROJECTILE_MAX_ADDITIVE_XYZ_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum projectile XYZ additional acceleration time points

macro.name: MAX_WEAPON_HAVEN_CNT
macro.desc: Maximum acquired weapon records, 6000/8 same as otherinfoproto.xml

macro.name: CS_SOULBEAST_INTERACTOR_NAME_MAX
macro.desc: Maximum soul beast interaction action name length

macro.name: CS_MAX_APPEAR_NTF_NUM
macro.desc: Maximum objects in appear sync packet

macro.name: CS_MAX_APPEAR_ID_NTF_NUM
macro.desc: Maximum object IDs in appear sync packet

macro.name: CS_LEVEL_THOUSAND_LAYER_DATA_COUNT_MAX
macro.desc: Maximum thousand-layer tower floor data count

macro.name: CS_MAX_NPCATDINFO_DATA_LEN
macro.desc: Maximum NPC group affection data length

macro.name: CS_MAIL_BUFFER_MAX_LEN
macro.desc: Maximum mail attachment item buffer length

macro.name: MAX_BTL_RESULT_UI_SHOW_DATA_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum instance settlement custom info count

macro.name: MAX_PVP_SELECT_HUNTING_BOX_MEMBER_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum hunting bag member info count

macro.name: CS_LEGENDPEARL_UPLEVEL_MAX_MATERIAL_NUM
macro.desc: Maximum skill pearl upgrade point items

macro.name: SECRET_RESEARCH_LAB_ITEM_BOX_MAX_LEN
macro.desc: Secret research lab lottery box count

macro.name: CS_MAX_OTHER_GUILD_INFO_LEN
macro.desc: Other guild info, consistent with csproto.xml

macro.name: CS_MAX_GUILD_WAR_GRAB_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum guild war single grab count, equals team size limit

macro.name: CS_MAX_RANK_RAPIDHUNT_HISTORY_ROLE_LEN
macro.desc: Previous rapid hunt member count per term

macro.name: CS_FRIENDS_NTF_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum single notification count, same as friends+passersby+blacklist max

macro.name: CS_SACTIVITY_TIME_LENGTH
macro.desc: Script activity date requires 5 date segments

macro.name: CS_SACTIVITY_MAX_DATA_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum script activity attached data count

macro.name: CS_SACTIVITY_MAX_SHOW_PERIOD_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum script activity display period count

macro.name: CS_SACTIVITY_HUNT_TASK_MAX_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum hunt tasks in script activity

macro.name: CS_SACTIVITY_HUNT_BOSS_MAX_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum hunt task bosses in script activity

macro.name: CS_SACTIVITY_HUNT_TAG_MAX_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum hunt task instance tags in script activity

macro.name: CS_MAX_LEVELBOX_ITEM_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum items from level gift box

macro.name: MAX_ACTION_STEP_LEN
macro.desc: Action completion bit flag max length, consistent with csproto.xml

macro.name: MAX_ACTION_FINISH_BIT_TAG_LEN
macro.desc: Action completion bit flag max length, consistent with csproto.xml, 5 * 32 * 8 (5 chapters)

macro.name: MAX_CHAPTER_LEN
macro.desc: Maximum chapter count, consistent with csproto.xml

macro.name: MAX_DEMON_TRIAL_LEN
macro.desc: Maximum chapter count, consistent with csproto.xml

macro.name: CS_MAX_RECORD_PASS_LEVEL_MIN_TIME_COUNT
macro.desc: Maximum demon trial generated level count

macro.name: CS_PLAYER_SELECT_USE_TASKBOARD
macro.desc: Player chooses to open hunting board

macro.name: CS_ACTION_TYPE_SIMPLE
macro.desc: Basic action, such as hide, enable, etc.

macro.name: CS_IDIP_NOTICE_ToWait
macro.desc: IDIP push notice to queued players

macro.name: CS_CMD_GROUP_MSGBOX
macro.desc: Message confirmation box, 0x18 used by someone but not declared here

macro.name: CS_CMD_UNSELECT_LINE_REQ
macro.desc: c--->s, when closing line selection UI, send this packet to set Session state

macro.name: CS_CMD_MULTI_NET_IPINFO
macro.desc: c--->s, dual-line server room IP selection data, recorded by server

macro.name: CS_CMD_MULTI_ISP_SEQUENCE_NTF
macro.desc: s--->c, dual-line server room ISP sequence notification

macro.name: CS_CMD_CLOSE_CONNECTION_REQ
macro.desc: Logically close battle instance connection request

macro.name: CS_CMD_CLOSE_CONNECTION_RSP
macro.desc: Logically close battle instance connection confirm response

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_OPT_SYN_REQ
macro.desc: User instance main UI sync request

macro.name: CS_CMD_PLAYER_BACK_TO_TOWN
macro.desc: Return to town when entering instance fails

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_OPT_SYN_RSP
macro.desc: User instance main UI sync response

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_ENTER_OPT_REQ
macro.desc: User instance main UI enter instance request

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_ENTER_OPT_RSP
macro.desc: User instance main UI enter instance response

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_AGREE_OPT_REQ
macro.desc: User instance main UI confirm enter request

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_AGREE_OPT_RSP
macro.desc: User instance main UI confirm enter response

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_UI_REQ
macro.desc: User or team leader self UI instance display sync request

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIN_INSTANCE_UI_RSP
macro.desc: User or team leader self UI instance display sync response

macro.name: CS_CMD_ALL_ENTRUST_LEVEL_LIST_REQ
macro.desc: Get all entrust level list request

macro.name: CS_CMD_ALL_ENTRUST_LEVEL_LIST_RSP
macro.desc: Get all entrust level list response

macro.name: CS_CMD_SVRSTATUS_NTF
macro.desc: Send server online status for QC use

macro.name: CS_CMD_SELECT_LINE_REQ
macro.desc: c-->s, select a line when logging in character

macro.name: CS_CMD_LINEINFO_RSP
macro.desc: c-->s, line selection info at login or line info response, TownServer info including available list and busy status

macro.name: CS_CMD_SWITCH_LINE_RSP
macro.desc: s-->c, returned on failure, otherwise directly proceed with line switch

macro.name: CS_CMD_SWITCH_LINE
macro.desc: s-->c, request client to switch line, not necessarily a response to request

macro.name: CS_CMD_SELECT_UI_PROCESS_OK_NTF
macro.desc: s-c UI process all OK, ready to enter instance

macro.name: CS_CMD_COUNTDOWN_END_REQ
macro.desc: High level role deletion countdown end request

macro.name: CS_CMD_COUNTDOWN_END_RSP
macro.desc: High level role deletion countdown end response

macro.name: CS_CMD_AUTO_START_PROCESS
macro.desc: Server notifies player to auto-start a process

macro.name: CS_CMD_CHAT_PRIVATE_REQ
macro.desc: Client whisper and private chat request

macro.name: CS_CMD_CHAT_RSP
macro.desc: Chat request error response sent to client

macro.name: CS_CMD_CHAT_NTF
macro.desc: Other player chat notification sent to client

macro.name: CS_CMD_CHAT_TARGET_QUERY_REQ
macro.desc: Client chat query target player info request

macro.name: CS_CMD_CHAT_TARGET_QUERY_RSP
macro.desc: Client chat query target player info response

macro.name: CS_CMD_LOAD_ENTITY_REQ
macro.desc: Client request load corresponding LogicEntity data

macro.name: CS_CMD_PVP_KILL_PLAYER_INFO_NTF
macro.desc: PVP player kill player info notification

macro.name: CS_CMD_PVP_DAMAGE_PLAYER_INFO_NTF
macro.desc: PVP player damage player info notification

macro.name: CS_CMD_BATTLE_MCM_CHANGE
macro.desc: Animation movement drive method change message

macro.name: CS_CMD_PLAY_FX
macro.desc: LL layer play effect sync, hacky

macro.name: CS_CMD_PLAYER_ABNORMAL_NTF
macro.desc: Player abnormal state buff upward sync

macro.name: CS_CMD_C2S_PLAYER_LEAVE_EVADE_NTF
macro.desc: Client tell server exit dodge roll

macro.name: CS_CMD_PLAYER_LOCK_ACTION_ACK
macro.desc: Lock player current FSM client confirm

macro.name: CS_CMD_PLAYER_RESET_STATE_NTF
macro.desc: Notify server reset player state machine

macro.name: CS_CMD_CLIENT_PLAYER_REVIVESTATE
macro.desc: Client player report revive related state

macro.name: CS_CMD_ENTER_LEVEL_NTF
macro.desc: Client load level complete, enter level

macro.name: CS_CMD_LOGICBT_FGEVENT_SYNC
macro.desc: Logic BT flow graph event sync

macro.name: CS_CMD_RANDOM_POS_REQ
macro.desc: Random position request, for robot use

macro.name: CS_CMD_RANDOM_POS_RSP
macro.desc: Random position response, for robot use

macro.name: CS_CMD_PLAYER_REGION_JUMP_END
macro.desc: Character zone change end, client notify server

macro.name: CS_CMD_BTOBJ_SIMPLE_LOCOMOTION
macro.desc: BT object simple locomotion sync (position and target position)

macro.name: CS_CMD_SEQUENCE_SYNC
macro.desc: Server sync TrackView state to client

macro.name: CS_CMD_PLAY_SEQUENCE_REQ
macro.desc: Client request server to play Sequence

macro.name: CS_CMD_FARM_SET_PET_REQ
macro.desc: Farm set pet to gather point request

macro.name: CS_CMD_FARM_SET_PET_RSP
macro.desc: Farm set pet to gather point response

macro.name: CS_CMD_FARM_ADVANCED_FACILITY_OPEN_NTF
macro.desc: Farm advanced gather facility open notification

macro.name: CS_CMD_ENTER_LEVEL_RSP
macro.desc: Client load level complete, enter level, server response

macro.name: CS_CMD_SYSTEM_DROP_CLIENT_NOTIFY_INFO
macro.desc: Kick client server notify client popup info

macro.name: CS_CMD_TEAM_UPDATE_NETID_NTF
macro.desc: Update teammate NetId when back online

macro.name: CS_CMD_TEAM_SEARCH_TEAM_BY_ID_REQ
macro.desc: Quick team search by team ID request

macro.name: CS_CMD_TEAM_SEARCH_TEAMS_REQ
macro.desc: Quick team search team list request

macro.name: CS_CMD_TEAM_SEARCH_BY_NAME_REQ
macro.desc: Quick team search by team name request

macro.name: CS_CMD_ITEM_REQ_MOVEITEM
macro.desc: Client request move item to slot

macro.name: CS_CMD_ITEM_UPDATE_ITEM
macro.desc: Server update client item, including C2 cases

macro.name: CS_CMD_ITEM_RES_RANKLEVELUP2SIX
macro.desc: Equipment rank up to six broadcast

macro.name: CS_CMD_ITEM_BOX_OPEN_SYNC
macro.desc: Open box result return to client

macro.name: CS_CMD_SUPPLY_BOX_STATE_NTF
macro.desc: Supply box open and disable notification

macro.name: CS_CMD_CONTRIBUTE_BOX_STATE_NTF
macro.desc: Contribution box open and disable notification

macro.name: CS_CMD_NPCSHOP_BUYITEM_RSP
macro.desc: Result of buying item from shop

macro.name: CS_CMD_NPCSHOP_SELLITEM_RSP
macro.desc: Result of selling item from bag

macro.name: CS_CMD_TRADE_ADDEQUIP_NTF
macro.desc: Notify client add equipment trade item

macro.name: CS_CMD_FRIEND_QUERY_REQ
macro.desc: Get friend system all info request

macro.name: CS_CMD_FRIEND_QUERY_RSP
macro.desc: Get friend system all info return

macro.name: CS_CMD_PET_SUPPORT_SKILL_LEVELUP_REQ
macro.desc: Pet support skill level up request

macro.name: CS_CMD_PET_SUPPORT_SKILL_LEVELUP_RSP
macro.desc: Pet support skill level up response

macro.name: CS_CMD_PET_GIFT_SKILL_LEVELUP_REQ
macro.desc: Pet innate skill level up request

macro.name: CS_CMD_PET_GIFT_SKILL_LEVELUP_RSP
macro.desc: Pet innate skill level up response

macro.name: CS_CMD_PET_WAIT_SKILL_NEW_NTF
macro.desc: Pet waiting skill new info notification

macro.name: CS_CMD_MSGBOX_SAFE_MODE_NTF
macro.desc: Notify client enter protection mode dialog

macro.name: CS_CMD_MSGBOX_SAFE_TIME_NTF
macro.desc: Notify client in safe time dialog

macro.name: CS_CMD_MAIL_LOGIN_RES
macro.desc: Role login reminder for unread mail

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_GIVE_UP_REQ
macro.desc: Guild match cancel sign up request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_GIVE_UP_RSP
macro.desc: Guild match cancel sign up response

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_SIGN_UP_AGREE_REQ
macro.desc: Guild match sign up confirm request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_SIGN_UP_AGREE_RSP
macro.desc: Guild match sign up confirm response

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_SIGN_UP_READY_NTF
macro.desc: Guild match sign up ready notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_QUALIFIER_RESULT_LIST_REQ
macro.desc: Guild match qualifier result list request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_PAIR_LIST_REQ
macro.desc: Guild match knockout pair list request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_SIGN_UP_LIST_REQ
macro.desc: Guild match sign up list request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_PAIR_ACCEPT_RSP
macro.desc: Guild match knockout round accept response

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_MATCH_PAIR_ENTER_ERR_NTF
macro.desc: Guild match knockout enter fail notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_ROOM_INIT_INFO
macro.desc: Resend room info when player enters BS

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_SELECT_COMERCE_BOAT_REQ
macro.desc: Guild war select trade ship request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_SELECT_COMERCE_BOAT_RSP
macro.desc: Guild war select trade ship response

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_GET_GUILD_STATUS_REQ
macro.desc: Guild war get guild status request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_GET_GUILD_STATUS_RSP
macro.desc: Guild war get guild status response

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_GET_COMERCE_BOAT_STATUS_REQ
macro.desc: Guild war get trade ship status request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_GET_COMERCE_BOAT_STATUS_RSP
macro.desc: Guild war get trade ship status response

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_COMERCE_BOAT_STATUS_NTF
macro.desc: Guild war trade ship status change notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_GUILD_COMMERCE_CHANGE_NTF
macro.desc: Guild war commerce resource change notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_CATCUISINE_REMAINS_NTF
macro.desc: Cat cuisine remaining and effect notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_CATCUISINE_UNLOCK_CHANGE_STATE_REQ
macro.desc: Cat cuisine unlock state change request

macro.name: CS_CMD_CATCUISINE_UNLOCK_CHANGE_STATE_RSP
macro.desc: Cat cuisine unlock state change response

macro.name: CS_CMD_GIFTBAGGROUP_STATE_NTF
macro.desc: Gift bag group state change notify

macro.name: C2S_CMD_ACTIVITY_WILDHUNT_FETCHTASKCOUNT
macro.desc: Wild hunt claim extra task count

macro.name: CS_CMD_TOWER_SUPPLY_OPEN_NTF
macro.desc: Thousand layer tower supply box open

macro.name: CS_CMD_TOWER_SUPPLY_PLAYER_SELECTED_NTF
macro.desc: Thousand layer tower supply box player select item (bidirectional)

macro.name: CS_CMD_TOWER_SUPPLY_CLOSE_NTF
macro.desc: Thousand layer tower supply box close

macro.name: CS_CMD_DRAGONBOX_OPEN_NTF
macro.desc: Dragon secret treasure open box notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_DRAGONBOX_DETAIL_REQ
macro.desc: Request dragon secret treasure detail info

macro.name: CS_CMD_DRAGONBOX_DETAIL_RSP
macro.desc: Dragon secret treasure detail info response

macro.name: CS_CMD_DRAGONBOX_REFRESH_CHESS_REQ
macro.desc: Request refresh dragon secret treasure board

macro.name: CS_CMD_DRAGONBOX_OPEN_BOX_REQ
macro.desc: Dragon secret treasure open box request

macro.name: CS_CMD_FECTCH_SELECT_ITEMBOX_OPEN_BOX_NTF
macro.desc: Get selectable treasure box item notify

macro.name: S2C_CMD_RANK_RAPIDHUNT_LIST_RSP
macro.desc: Get previous rapid hunt rank list from to

macro.name: CS_CMD_GET_MANAGE_URL_REQ
macro.desc: Sensitive operation manage page URL request

macro.name: CS_CMD_GET_MANAGE_URL_RSP
macro.desc: Sensitive operation manage page URL response

macro.name: CS_CMD_VIP_SERVICE_EXPIRE_REQ
macro.desc: UI loaded query VIP service expire request

macro.name: CS_CMD_VIP_SERVICE_EXPIRE_RSP
macro.desc: UI loaded query VIP service expire response

macro.name: S2C_CMD_SACTIVITY_TIME_UPATE_NTF
macro.desc: Server notify activity start end time change

macro.name: CS_CMD_EN_GROUP_GAIN_REWARD_REQ
macro.desc: Entrust large group reward claim request

macro.name: CS_CMD_EN_GROUP_GAIN_REWARD_RSP
macro.desc: Entrust large group reward claim response

macro.name: CS_CMD_LEVEL_THOUSAND_LAYER_UPDATE_NTF
macro.desc: Thousand layer tower floor best record

macro.name: CS_CMD_PVP_SELECT_HUNTING_BAG_START_NTF
macro.desc: All players PVP instance select hunting bag end

macro.name: CS_CMD_PVP_SELECT_HUNTING_BAG_FINISH_NTF
macro.desc: Same faction players PVP instance select hunting bag end

macro.name: CS_CMD_PVP_ALL_SELECT_HUNTING_BAG_FINISH_NTF
macro.desc: All players PVP instance select hunting bag end

macro.name: CS_CMD_PVP_PLAYER_SCORE_NTF
macro.desc: PVP instance player score change notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_SUPER_GAIN_CHALLANGE_REWARD_REQ
macro.desc: Super combo claim challenge reward request

macro.name: CS_CMD_SUPER_GAIN_CHALLANGE_REWARD_RSP
macro.desc: Super combo claim challenge reward response

macro.name: CS_CMD_SUPER_GAIN_SUCCESS_REWARD_REQ
macro.desc: Super combo claim success reward request

macro.name: CS_CMD_SUPER_GAIN_SUCCESS_REWARD_RSP
macro.desc: Super combo claim success reward response

macro.name: CS_CMD_FARM_EQUIP_AVATAR_REQ
macro.desc: Farm equip display rack info request

macro.name: CS_CMD_FARM_EQUIP_AVATAR_RSP
macro.desc: Farm equip display rack info response

macro.name: CS_CMD_FARM_SET_EQUIP_AVATAR_REQ
macro.desc: Farm set equip display rack info request

macro.name: CS_CMD_FARM_SET_EQUIP_AVATAR_NTF
macro.desc: Farm set equip display rack info notify

macro.name: CS_CMD_BATTLE_PAYHUNTINGCREDIT_RSP
macro.desc: Pay hunting ticket for reward response

macro.name: CS_CMD_BATTLE_CATEXTRA_REWARD_LIST_REQ
macro.desc: Felyne dig reward list get request

macro.name: CS_CMD_BATTLE_CATEXTRA_REWARD_LIST_RSP
macro.desc: Felyne dig reward list get response

macro.name: CS_CMD_BATTLE_CATEXTRA_REWARD_RESET_REQ
macro.desc: Felyne dig reward list reset request

macro.name: CS_CMD_BATTLE_CATEXTRA_REWARD_RESET_RSP
macro.desc: Felyne dig reward list reset response

macro.name: CS_CMD_LIKE_HUNTER_OFFICER_REQ
macro.desc: Instance end hunter officer like request

macro.name: CS_CMD_LIKE_HUNTER_OFFICER_RSP
macro.desc: Instance end hunter officer like response

macro.name: C2S_CMD_LEGENDPEARL_CONFIRM_REPLACE_ABILITY_REQ
macro.desc: Legend pearl confirm replace ability request

macro.name: S2C_CMD_LEGENDPEARL_CONFIRM_REPLACE_ABILITY_RSP
macro.desc: Legend pearl confirm replace ability response

macro.name: C2S_CMD_GUIDE_BOOK_AUTO_FIRST_OPEN_REQ
macro.desc: Guide book first auto open request

macro.name: S2C_CMD_GUIDE_BOOK_AUTO_FIRST_OPEN_RSP
macro.desc: Guide book first auto open response

macro.name: C2S_CMD_GUIDE_BOOK_GET_CHAPTER_REWARD_REQ
macro.desc: Guide book claim chapter reward request

macro.name: S2C_CMD_GUIDE_BOOK_GET_CHAPTER_REWARD_RSP
macro.desc: Guide book claim chapter reward response

macro.name: C2S_CMD_SECRET_RESEARCH_LAB_HANDLE_REFRESH_REQ
macro.desc: Secret research lab manual refresh C2S

macro.name: S2C_CMD_SECRET_RESEARCH_LAB_HANDLE_REFRESH_RSP
macro.desc: Secret research lab manual refresh S2C

macro.name: S2C_CMD_SECRET_RESEARCH_LAB_DALIY_REFRESH_RSP
macro.desc: Secret research lab daily refresh S2C

macro.name: S2C_CMD_SECRET_RESEARCH_LAB_CLOCK_REFRESH_RSP
macro.desc: Secret research lab scheduled refresh S2C

macro.name: S2C_CMD_SECRET_RESEARCH_LAB_DATA_SYNCHRONIZATION_RSP
macro.desc: Secret research lab data sync S2C

macro.name: kScriptActivityDataType_ScriptAttachParam
macro.desc: Execute script - supports client reporting two int values

entry.name: tdr_not_support_empty
entry.desc: TDR does not support empty struct

struct.name: CSSuperSeriesGainChallangeRewardReq
struct.desc: Super series claim challenge reward request

entry.name: viplevel
entry.desc: VIP level 0: non-VIP reward, other: current VIP level reward

struct.name: CSSuperSeriesGainChallangeRewardRsp
struct.desc: Super series claim challenge reward response

struct.name: CSSuperSeriesGainSuccessRewardReq
struct.desc: Super series claim success reward request

entry.name: viplevel
entry.desc: VIP level 0: non-VIP reward, other: current VIP level reward

struct.name: CSSuperSeriesGainSuccessRewardRsp
struct.desc: Super series claim success reward response

entry.name: RoleStateEndLeftTime
entry.desc: Remaining time until role state ends

entry.name: DBID
entry.desc: DBID, client not required to fill, lookup after NameSvr returns

entry.name: RoleStateEndLeftTime
entry.desc: Remaining time until role state expires

entry.name: ErrNo
entry.desc: 0 for success, -3 means no available TownServer, otherwise error code

entry.name: RoleStateEndLeftTime
entry.desc: Remaining time until role state expires

struct.name: CSCountdownEndReq
struct.desc: High level role delete countdown end request

struct.name: CSCountdownEndRsp
struct.desc: High level role delete countdown end response

entry.name: RoleStateEndLeftTime
entry.desc: Remaining time until role state expires

struct.name: CSSelectLineReq
struct.desc: c-->s, select a line when logging in role

struct.name: CSUnSelectLineReq
struct.desc: c-->s, when closing line selection UI, send this packet to set Session state

entry.name: State
entry.desc: State [1: Idle, 2: Normal, 3: Busy, 4: Full, 5: Maintenance]

entry.name: open
entry.desc: Whether to start playing or clear

entry.name: teleport
entry.desc: Whether teleport movement (not restricted by physics)

entry.name: IgnoreTag
entry.desc: Whether to ignore version check flag

entry.name: ProtoVer
entry.desc: Client protocol version, used for protocol version trimming

entry.name: Reserve1
entry.desc: Reserved field 1, this protocol does not support version trimming since client and server exchange versions

entry.name: Reserve2
entry.desc: Reserved field 2, this protocol does not support version trimming since client and server exchange versions

entry.name: MajorVerNo
entry.desc: Server major version, for testing, may remove in production to prevent cheating

entry.name: MinorVerNo
entry.desc: Server minor version, for testing, may remove in production to prevent cheating

entry.name: RevisVerNo
entry.desc: Server revision version, for testing, may remove in production to prevent cheating

entry.name: BuildVerNo
entry.desc: Server build version, for testing, may remove in production to prevent cheating

struct.name: CSDropClientNotifyInfo
struct.desc: Kick client server notify client popup info

struct.name: CSMainInstanceOptSynReq
struct.desc: Instance main UI operation sync request

struct.name: CSMainInstanceOptSynRsp
struct.desc: Instance main UI operation sync response

struct.name: CSMainInstanceEnterOptReq
struct.desc: Instance main UI operation enter request

struct.name: CSMainInstanceEnterOptRsp
struct.desc: Instance main UI operation enter response

entry.name: HuntingMode
entry.desc: Hunting mode 0: hunting ticket 1: contract gold

entry.name: WeaponRecordTime
entry.desc: Current layer time record for each weapon

entry.name: SilverCount
entry.desc: Current silver amount in storage box

entry.name: WeekFreeFetchTimes
entry.desc: Free silver fetch times this week

entry.name: WeekBuyFetchTimes
entry.desc: Paid silver fetch times this week

entry.name: ShowUI
entry.desc: Whether to show hunting bag UI

struct.name: CSPVPPlayerJoinHuntingBagStartNtf
struct.desc: Player join PVP hunting bag list

entry.name: ShowUI
entry.desc: Whether to show prepare stage UI

struct.name: CSSelectUIProcessOKNtf
struct.desc: Enter instance UI process all OK

entry.name: PvpLastGetScorePlayerNetID
entry.desc: PVP player ID who scored last causing level end

struct.name: CSMainInstanceUIReq
struct.desc: User or team leader self UI instance display sync request

struct.name: CSMainInstanceUIInfoList
struct.desc: Instance main UI display info list

struct.name: CSMainInstanceUIRsp
struct.desc: User or team leader self UI instance display sync response

struct.name: CSPayHuntingCredit
struct.desc: Pay hunting ticket to receive reward

struct.name: CSPayHuntingRsp
struct.desc: Pay hunting ticket to receive reward

entry.name: FakeItemInfo
entry.desc: Current round hunting temporary item mapping

struct.name: CSBackToTown
struct.desc: Failed to enter instance return to town

entry.name: LevelRandSeed
entry.desc: Level internal data random seed, for specific systems

entry.name: VerifyType
entry.desc: Verify type, normal verify 0, battle direct connect test verify 1

entry.name: Reserve1
entry.desc: Reserved field 1, this protocol does not support version trimming since client and server exchange versions

entry.name: Reserve2
entry.desc: Reserved field 2, this protocol does not support version trimming since client and server exchange versions

entry.name: Type
entry.desc: Leave method, 0: exit game, 1: return to town instance entry point 2: return to town main city

struct.name: CSLoadEntityReq
struct.desc: Client fetch Entity info by ID

struct.name: CSSysGMCmdReq
struct.desc: Client system control GM command request

struct.name: CSAddPeriodLimitCountNtf
struct.desc: Player entrust period extra count sync

entry.name: MinTime
entry.desc: Shortest time in seconds, planning does not need millisecond precision

struct.name: CSLevelThousandLayerUpdateNtf
struct.desc: Thousand layer tower floor historical best record

entry.name: Type
entry.desc: 1 means changed from non-0 to 0, 2 means adding EXP when REMAIN is 0 but ineffective

entry.name: UIShowTime
entry.desc: Whether to let client send time display EVENT

entry.name: SubTypeID
entry.desc: scene obj type id, defined by each scene obj

entry.name: Sync2CE
entry.desc: Whether to sync spawn to CE, 0 for no, other for yes

entry.name: SpawnType
entry.desc: Spawn type, 0 absolute position, 1 relative bone position

entry.name: itemId
entry.desc: Item Id used on spawn (if any)

entry.name: delay
entry.desc: the time between spawn and launch

entry.name: speedScale
entry.desc: speed scale on static data speed

entry.name: overrideTrail
entry.desc: Bool variable, whether to override excel params with following params

entry.name: gravityChangeTime
entry.desc: Gravity changes after this time (bow only)

entry.name: launchType
entry.desc: Launch method (for validation and sync, see ProjLaunchParams.h)

entry.name: additiveAccXYZMode
entry.desc: Bool variable, whether to use XYZ axis extra acceleration

entry.name: additiveAccCount
entry.desc: XYZ extra acceleration time point count

entry.name: State
entry.desc: 1 means already claimed, 0 means not claimed

entry.name: GainVipChallangeRewardTimes
entry.desc: Today VIP challenge reward claim count

entry.name: GainVipSuccessRewardTimes
entry.desc: Today VIP success reward claim count

entry.name: State
entry.desc: Historical state, never entered, entered but not cleared, won, lost

entry.name: GainRewardFlag
entry.desc: Historical score reward claim flag, bitwise count

struct.name: PlayerAddLevelPeriodLimitInfo
struct.desc: Added instance max period limit info

struct.name: PlayerPassEntrustLevelInfo
struct.desc: Entrust level period completion count data

struct.name: CSThousandLayerDataInfo
struct.desc: Thousand layer tower floor clear time

entry.name: PlayerThousandLayerDataCount
entry.desc: Thousand layer tower floor best time record

entry.name: EntrustGroupDataLen
entry.desc: Entrust large group statistics data length

struct.name: C2SSecretResearchLabHandleRefreshReq
struct.desc: Secret research lab manual refresh C2S

struct.name: LotteryItemType
struct.desc: Secret research lab reward item info

struct.name: S2CSecretResearchLabHandleRefreshRsp
struct.desc: Secret research lab manual refresh S2C

struct.name: SRLCostMaterialType
struct.desc: Secret research lab deducted material info

struct.name: S2CSecretResearchLabDaliyRefreshRsp
struct.desc: Secret research lab daily refresh S2C

struct.name: S2CSecretResearchLabClockRefreshRsp
struct.desc: Secret research lab scheduled refresh S2C

struct.name: ItemBoxType
struct.desc: Secret research lab lottery box info

struct.name: S2CSecretResearchLabDataSynchronizationRsp
struct.desc: Secret research lab data sync S2C

entry.name: PvpPrepareStageState
entry.desc: PVP initial prepare stage state, 1 means ended, 0 means started

entry.name: CurPlayerUsedCatCarCount
entry.desc: Current player used cat cart count

struct.name: CSEnGroupGainRewardReq
struct.desc: Entrust large group reward claim request

struct.name: CSEnGroupGainRewardRsp
struct.desc: Entrust large group reward claim response

entry.name: LevelEnterType
entry.desc: Level enter type, such as new TownSvr entry, instance return to TownSvr, TownSvr Hub switch, etc.

entry.name: SpawnType
entry.desc: Spawn type, 0 absolute position, 1 relative bone position

entry.name: CEClassName
entry.desc: Corresponding CEClassName, temporarily placed here when no trap config

entry.name: Param
entry.desc: Additional parameter, parsed based on spawn type

entry.name: ReviveType
entry.desc: Revive method, 1 cat cart 2 cat cart ticket 3 revive coin

entry.name: ReviveType
entry.desc: Revive method, 0 on spot 1 cat cart -1 failed

entry.name: CatCarType
entry.desc: Cat cart type, 0 normal cat cart, 1 on spot cat cart

entry.name: Param
entry.desc: If cat cart, this is corresponding cat cart LogicEntityID

entry.name: PlayerID
entry.desc: Player ID requesting to revive other

entry.name: ReviveType
entry.desc: Revive method, 1 cat cart 2 cat cart ticket 3 revive coin

entry.name: ReviveType
entry.desc: Revive method, 0 on spot 1 cat cart -1 failed

entry.name: Param
entry.desc: If cat cart, this is corresponding cat cart LogicEntityID

struct.name: CSChatPrivateReq
struct.desc: Client whisper and private chat request

struct.name: CSChatRsp
struct.desc: Chat request error response sent to client

struct.name: CSChatNtf
struct.desc: Other player chat notification sent to client

entry.name: SrcLevelGrpId
entry.desc: Source role level logic group ID

entry.name: SendByMe
entry.desc: Whether sent by self to single other (1=true or 0=false), only whisper channel uses this, to distinguish if other said to self or self said to other. If self said to other, SourceID and SourceName are target player ID and name.

entry.name: ContainBanWords
entry.desc: Whether contains whisper sensitive words (1 contains, 0 not)

entry.name: SrcLevel
entry.desc: Source player normal level, HR level if max

struct.name: CSEnterLevelNtf
struct.desc: Client load level complete, enter level

struct.name: CSEnterLevelRsp
struct.desc: Client load level complete, enter level response

entry.name: targetId
entry.desc: EntityId of the target which got shot

entry.name: projectileId
entry.desc: 0 if hit was not caused by a projectile

entry.name: material
entry.desc: material id of the surface which got hit

entry.name: type
entry.desc: type id of the hit, see IGameRules::GetHitTypeId for more information

entry.name: bulletType
entry.desc: type of bullet, if hit was of type bullet

entry.name: attackDir
entry.desc: attack direction, namely the moving direction of weapon slash.

entry.name: defenseResult
entry.desc: Defense result: 0 No defense 1-5 defense level

entry.name: HitIndex
entry.desc: Attack additional damage index, provides client with damage value position

entry.name: Flags
entry.desc: Animation playback flags, corresponds to CryCharAnimationParams

struct.name: CSDMGVerifyContext
struct.desc: Client to server hit behavior verify context

entry.name: AttackerEntityPos
entry.desc: Attacker position and rotation when hit occurs

entry.name: AttackeeEntityPos
entry.desc: Target position and rotation when hit occurs

struct.name: CSTargetVerifyContext
struct.desc: Client to server hit behavior verify context

entry.name: AttackeeEntityPos
entry.desc: Target position and rotation when hit occurs

entry.name: AttackerEntityPos
entry.desc: Attacker position and rotation when hit occurs

entry.name: AttackeeEntityPos
entry.desc: Target position and rotation when hit occurs

entry.name: NetObjId
entry.desc: Net object id assigned by server

entry.name: SendSrvId
entry.desc: Server forwarded SrvID 0 means broadcast other means specified sent srvid

entry.name: StateID
entry.desc: State flag value of client side

entry.name: NetObjId
entry.desc: NetObjId of Actor to execute animation

entry.name: NetObjId
entry.desc: NetObjId of Actor to execute animation

entry.name: NetObjId
entry.desc: NetObjId of Actor to execute animation

struct.name: CSBattleEntitySpeed
struct.desc: Sync message for fixed speed/acceleration entity movement

entry.name: IsStart
entry.desc: Flag for movement start or end

entry.name: Transform
entry.desc: Player position and rotation after region change

struct.name: CSPlayerRegionJumpEnd
struct.desc: Player region change end client notify server

entry.name: FireType
entry.desc: Fire type, 0 item main cannon 1 item sub cannon 2 buff ammo main cannon

entry.name: Result
entry.desc: Cooking result: raw, rare, done, burnt

entry.name: PtrSize
entry.desc: Size of Ptr content in original SGameObjectEvent

entry.name: ParamSize
entry.desc: Size of Param content in original SGameObjectEvent

entry.name: Param1Size
entry.desc: Size of Param1 content in original SGameObjectEvent

struct.name: CSPlayerAmmoChangeRsp
struct.desc: Sync player ammo change behavior response

struct.name: CSBattleMcmChange
struct.desc: Animation move control mode change event

struct.name: CSAGInput
struct.desc: Current all AGInput values, for mid-instance enter or AG resync

struct.name: CSAGAllInput
struct.desc: Current all AGInput values, for mid-instance enter or AG resync

entry.name: SteeringEnabled
entry.desc: Whether in steering system control state

entry.name: FirstBuffId
entry.desc: Immediately triggered abnormal state buff ID

entry.name: FirstBuffOwner
entry.desc: Immediately triggered abnormal state buff caster

entry.name: SecondBuffId
entry.desc: Delayed triggered abnormal state buff ID

entry.name: SecondBuffOwner
entry.desc: Delayed triggered abnormal state buff caster

struct.name: CSChatTargetQueryReq
struct.desc: Client chat query target player info request

struct.name: CSChatTargetQueryRsp
struct.desc: Client chat query target player info response

struct.name: ClientReviveState
struct.desc: Client player revive death related info

entry.name: Ret
entry.desc: Operation result, see return code definition

entry.name: EntityId
entry.desc: NetObjId of BT object to sync

struct.name: CSSpawnCollectTrigSYNC
struct.desc: Monster kill spawn collect point event sync

entry.name: EntityId
entry.desc: NetObjId of combat NPC to sync

struct.name: CSTeamUpdateNetIdNtf
struct.desc: Update member NetId when back online

struct.name: CSTeamSearchTeamByIdReq
struct.desc: Quick team search by team ID request

struct.name: CSTeamSearchByNameReq
struct.desc: Quick team search by team name request

struct.name: CSTeamSearchTeamsReq
struct.desc: Quick team search team list request

struct.name: CSTeamSetting
struct.desc: Team settings, must be exactly consistent with ss message SSTeamSetting!

entry.name: FreeJoin
entry.desc: Free join (set to 0 for leader auth)

entry.name: FreeJoin
entry.desc: Free join (set to 0 for leader auth)

struct.name: CSTeamPushVecNtf
struct.desc: Team member minimap click point notify

struct.name: CSTeamMemberBuffSync
struct.desc: Sync member buffs after joining team

struct.name: CSReqMoveItem
struct.desc: Request move item to specified column

struct.name: CSResMoveItem
struct.desc: Reply move item to specified column

struct.name: CSUpdateItem
struct.desc: Server update client items, including C2 update

entry.name: Enabled
entry.desc: Latest state, 0 for disabled, other for enabled

entry.name: Enabled
entry.desc: Latest state, 0 for disabled, other for enabled

entry.name: flag
entry.desc: Flag: 1 client needs to execute expand logic; 2 client does not need to execute expand logic

entry.name: BuyStartBoatTimes
entry.desc: Guild war purchased ship launch times

struct.name: CSGuildDepotRights
struct.desc: Guild depot permissions, must match SSGuildDepotRights!

struct.name: S2CGetGuildRandCommodities
struct.desc: Get guild limited purchase commodity set

entry.name: BanOperate
entry.desc: Mute operation, 0 for mute 1 for unmute

entry.name: GuildId
entry.desc: Guild ID, if 0 get top 5 and self

entry.name: OperType
entry.desc: Type--for extension, in case future categorized queries needed

entry.name: OperType
entry.desc: Type--for extension, in case future categorized queries needed

entry.name: OperType
entry.desc: Type--for extension, in case future categorized queries needed

struct.name: CSNpcShopBuyItemReq
struct.desc: Request to buy item from shop

entry.name: SaleItemId
entry.desc: Sale item ID, rowid in NpcSale.xlsx[Shop Info]

struct.name: CSNpcShopBuyItemRsp
struct.desc: Response to buy item from shop

struct.name: CSNpcShopSellItemReq
struct.desc: Request to sell item from bag

struct.name: CSNpcShopSellItemRsp
struct.desc: Response to sell item from bag

entry.name: ItemPlaceMent
entry.desc: Item production placement, 1 for bag, 2 for storage

entry.name: Reason
entry.desc: Reason, 1 for normal learning, 2 for enlightenment

entry.name: SrcID
entry.desc: Payment initiator index, returned in payment response

entry.name: Limit
entry.desc: Whether limited purchase, only one unclosed limited order can exist at a time

entry.name: LimitTime
entry.desc: Time limit in seconds, 0 for no limit

entry.name: IsShow
entry.desc: Whether shown in mall list, only valid when group is not 0. Group 0 shows all by default

entry.name: pos
entry.desc: Player's position in rank (1-based, 0 means not in rank)

entry.name: pos
entry.desc: Player's position in rank (1-based, 0 means not in rank)

entry.name: pos
entry.desc: Player's position in rank (1-based, 0 means not in rank)

struct.name: S2CRankRapidHuntListRsp
struct.desc: Get previous rapid hunt rank list from to

entry.name: pos
entry.desc: Player's position in rank (1-based, 0 means not in rank)

entry.name: Zone
entry.desc: Region, corresponds to xrank service applied world id

entry.name: ScoreType
entry.desc: Player's attached attribute, such as city. XRank will create multiple ranks based on this

entry.name: Limit
entry.desc: TopN rank limit, 0 means don't fetch topN, -1 fetches to the last

entry.name: UpDistance
entry.desc: Fuzzy rank percentage of top players, 0.1% is 0.1

entry.name: timeStamp
entry.desc: Time when player got current score

entry.name: RankType
entry.desc: Rank type, position or percentage range

entry.name: RankValue
entry.desc: Player's rank position or percentage, depends on rankType

entry.name: Zone
entry.desc: Region, corresponds to xrank service applied world id

entry.name: ScoreType
entry.desc: Player's attached attribute, such as city. XRank will create multiple ranks based on this

entry.name: topUsers
entry.desc: TopN rank limit, 0 means don't fetch topN, -1 fetches to the last

entry.name: Zone
entry.desc: Region, corresponds to xrank service applied world id

entry.name: GetBestRank
entry.desc: Whether to fetch user's world rank historical best rank

entry.name: FarmCanBGatheredCount
entry.desc: Remaining times player's farm can be gathered

struct.name: CSFriendQueryReq
struct.desc: Get all friend system info request

struct.name: FriendQueryInfo
struct.desc: Get all friend system info data

struct.name: CSFriendQueryRsp
struct.desc: Get all friend system info response

struct.name: CSPetWaitSkillNewNtf
struct.desc: Pet pending skill new info notify

struct.name: CSRoomInitInfo
struct.desc: Player enter BS, resend room essential info

struct.name: CSGuildMatchQualifierResultDel
struct.desc: Guild match qualifier ranking list delete

struct.name: CSGuildMatchQualifierResultAdd
struct.desc: Guild match qualifier ranking list add

struct.name: CSGuildMatchPairListNtf
struct.desc: Guild match knockout round pairing list

struct.name: CSGuildMatchPairAdd
struct.desc: Guild match knockout round pairing add

struct.name: CSGuildMatchPairEnterErrNtf
struct.desc: Guild knockout round enter failure notify

struct.name: CSMsgBoxNewNtf
struct.desc: Notify client to create new msg

struct.name: CSMsgBoxSafeModeNtf
struct.desc: Notify client to enter protection mode dialog

struct.name: CSMsgBoxSafeTimeNtf
struct.desc: Notify client in safe time dialog

entry.name: mailSource
entry.desc: Mail source: 0 player, 1 system, 2 system return, 3 player return

entry.name: MailNotifyType
entry.desc: 0:player has new mail;1:system return deleted due to full mailbox 2:system return needs player to receive;3:mail deleted due to expiry

entry.name: mailRemind
entry.desc: 0: no unread mail, 1: has unread mail

entry.name: mailRemindCount
entry.desc: -1: field has no meaning, non-negative: unread mail total

entry.name: TotalUnreadCount
entry.desc: Total unread count with rewards for all types

struct.name: CSGetManageUrlReq
struct.desc: Sensitive operation manage page URL request

struct.name: CSGetManageUrlRsp
struct.desc: Sensitive operation manage page URL response

struct.name: C2SActivityWildFetchTaskCount
struct.desc: Wild hunt claim extra task completion count

struct.name: S2CActivityAddSecretQuest
struct.desc: Red yellow confrontation add secret quest

struct.name: S2CActivityRemoveSecretQuest
struct.desc: Red yellow confrontation remove secret quest

struct.name: C2SActivityGetSecretQuest
struct.desc: Red yellow confrontation request secret quest

struct.name: CSLotteryWinnersNtf
struct.desc: Online random lottery activity winner notification

entry.name: DateDays
entry.desc: Weekly open days (1-7) or monthly open days (1-31)

entry.name: DateTime
entry.desc: Daily open time format: HH:mm~HH:mm, empty if none

entry.name: GetCountMax
entry.desc: Max claim count, negative means unlimited

entry.name: ScriptAttachParam
entry.desc: Execute script - supports client sending two int values on request

struct.name: S2CScriptActivityStateNtf
struct.desc: Server notify script activity state change

struct.name: S2CScriptActivityVarUpdateNtf
struct.desc: Server notify script activity variable change

struct.name: S2CScriptActivityCounterUpdateNtf
struct.desc: Server notify script activity counter change

struct.name: S2CScriptActivityTimeUpdateNtf
struct.desc: Server notify activity start/end time change

entry.name: Result2
entry.desc: Return value 2, varies based on return value 1

entry.name: ProbabilityInfo
entry.desc: Tower supply random rewards for different appraisals, for client display

struct.name: CSGiftBagGroupStateNtf
struct.desc: Gift pack group state change notification

entry.name: GoalLevel
entry.desc: Target level, 0 uses old logic to upgrade one tier per config

entry.name: GoalLevel
entry.desc: Target level, if 0 uses old logic to upgrade only one tier based on config

entry.name: bBind
entry.desc: Whether bound, 0 uses gold 1 uses silver

entry.name: ItemList
entry.desc: Item list (note: item count here is used as purchase count, get actual item count from table)

entry.name: Digit
entry.desc: 1 is units digit 2 is tens digit

entry.name: Digit
entry.desc: 1 is units digit 2 is tens digit

struct.name: CSMultiNetIpinfo
struct.desc: Dual-line datacenter IP selection data collection report

entry.name: DomainAnalyseIP
entry.desc: IP resolved from domain by current player

entry.name: PingDomainIP
entry.desc: Ping value of domain resolved IP

struct.name: CSVIPServiceExpireReq
struct.desc: UI loaded query VIP service expiration request

struct.name: CSVIPServiceExpireRsp
struct.desc: UI loaded query VIP service expiration response

struct.name: SigAll
struct.desc: Original signature, needs data from tconnd to reassemble

entry.name: TaskBuyDayNum
entry.desc: Paid task completion group purchase count

entry.name: MeetTime
entry.desc: Last mystery dragon meat claim time

entry.name: GiantTime
entry.desc: Last giant dragon meat claim time

struct.name: CSLegendPearlConfirmReplaceAbilityReq
struct.desc: Legendary skill pearl - confirm replace correction attribute - request

struct.name: CSLegendPearlConfirmReplaceAbilityRsp
struct.desc: Legendary skill pearl - confirm replace correction attribute - response

struct.name: CSStorageBoxSyncSilverDataNtf
struct.desc: Silver storage box data sync - notification

struct.name: ActionStepInfo
struct.desc: Action completion count, consistent with csproto.xml

struct.name: GuideActionInfo
struct.desc: Action completion count, consistent with csproto.xml

struct.name: GuideBookChapterInfo
struct.desc: Player newbie guide book chapter info, consistent with csproto.xml

struct.name: GuideBookInfo
struct.desc: Player newbie guide book info, consistent with csproto.xml

entry.name: IsFisrtAutoOpenGuideBook
entry.desc: Is first time auto open guide book

struct.name: CSGuideBookAutoFirstOpenReq
struct.desc: Guide book first auto open request

struct.name: SCGuideBookAutoFirstOpenRsp
struct.desc: Guide book first auto open response

struct.name: CSGuideBookGetChapterRewardReq
struct.desc: Guide book claim chapter reward request

struct.name: SCGuideBookGetChapterRewardRsp
struct.desc: Guide book claim chapter reward response

struct.name: CSGuideBookSetWeaponIdReq
struct.desc: Set newbie guide selected weapon request

struct.name: CSGuideBookSetWeaponIdRsp
struct.desc: Set newbie guide selected weapon response

struct.name: CSDemonTrialGetLevelPassTimeReq
struct.desc: Get demon trial minimum clear time

struct.name: SCDemonTrialGetLevelPassTimeRsp
struct.desc: Get demon trial minimum clear time

entry.name: IllustrateCardInfo
entry.desc: Physical card info 2 bits unused 10 bits monster index 4 bits card type 16 bits card count

entry.name: HeadLen
entry.desc: Message head length, added for tconnd TDR mode support

entry.name: UnSelectLineReq
entry.desc: c-->s, when closing line selection UI, send this packet to set Session state

entry.name: MultiNetIpinfo
entry.desc: Collect and report IP selection judgment data for dual-line datacenter

entry.name: BackToTown
entry.desc: Return to town when entering instance fails

entry.name: MainInstanceUIReq
entry.desc: User or team leader self UI instance display sync request

entry.name: MainInstanceUIRsp
entry.desc: User or team leader self UI instance display sync response

entry.name: AllEntrustLevelListReq
entry.desc: Get all entrust level list request

entry.name: AllEntrustLevelListRsp
entry.desc: Get all entrust level list response

entry.name: EntrustPeriodLimitEventNtf
entry.desc: Entrust period count limit event notification

entry.name: SelectLineReq
entry.desc: c-->s, select a line when logging in character

entry.name: LineInfoReq
entry.desc: c-->s, switch line request, request Line info

entry.name: LineInfoRsp
entry.desc: S--C, Line info, including available list and busy status

entry.name: SwitchLineReq
entry.desc: c-->s, request client to switch line

entry.name: SwitchLineRsp
entry.desc: s-->c, returned on failure, otherwise directly proceed with line switch

entry.name: NewLineInfo
entry.desc: s-->c, request client to switch line, client needs to clear all logic entities created by server messages on current map

entry.name: SelectUIProcessOKNtf
entry.desc: Enter instance UI process all OK

entry.name: CountdownEndReq
entry.desc: High level role deletion countdown end request

entry.name: CountdownEndRsp
entry.desc: High level role deletion countdown end response

entry.name: ChatPrivateReq
entry.desc: Client whisper and private chat request

entry.name: ChatRsp
entry.desc: Chat request error response sent to client

entry.name: ChatNtf
entry.desc: Other player chat notification sent to client

entry.name: ChatTargetQueryReq
entry.desc: Client chat query target player info request

entry.name: ChatTargetQueryRsp
entry.desc: Client chat query target player info response

entry.name: NewPlayer
entry.desc: Spawn New Player Request When Spawn Entity

entry.name: AssignId
entry.desc: Assign Player Identity to New Spawn Entity

entry.name: PvpPlayerKillNtf
entry.desc: PVP player kill player info notification

entry.name: PvpPlayerDamageNtf
entry.desc: PVP player damage player info notification

entry.name: EntitySpeed
entry.desc: Sync message for fixed speed and acceleration entity displacement

entry.name: PlayerLockActionAck
entry.desc: Lock player current FSM client confirmation

entry.name: ClientPlayerRevive
entry.desc: Client player death revive state report

entry.name: EnterLevelNtf
entry.desc: Client load level complete, enter scene

entry.name: PlayerRegionJumpEnd
entry.desc: Character zone change end, client notify server

entry.name: EnterLevelRsp
entry.desc: Client load level complete, enter scene response

entry.name: DropClientNotifyInfo
entry.desc: Kick client server notify client popup info

entry.name: TeamUpdateNetIdNtf
entry.desc: Update team member NetId when member comes back online

entry.name: TeamSearchTeamByIdReq
entry.desc: Quick team search by team ID request

entry.name: TeamSearchTeamsReq
entry.desc: Quick team search teams list request

entry.name: TeamSearchByNameReq
entry.desc: Quick team search by name request

entry.name: TeamPushVecNtf
entry.desc: Team member minimap click point notification

entry.name: TeamMemberBuffSync
entry.desc: Broadcast team member buffs after joining team

entry.name: TeamRaidInviteReq
entry.desc: A invites B to form raid

entry.name: ReqSwapItem
entry.desc: Client request swap items at two positions

entry.name: ReqMoveItem
entry.desc: Client request move item to an inventory

entry.name: UpdateItem
entry.desc: Server update client items, including C2 update case

entry.name: NpcShopBuyItemReq
entry.desc: Request to buy item from shop

entry.name: FriendQueryReq
entry.desc: Get all friend system info request

entry.name: FriendQueryRsp
entry.desc: Get all friend system info response

entry.name: PetWaitSkillDelReq
entry.desc: Pet delete pending equip skill request

entry.name: PetWaitSkillDelRsp
entry.desc: Pet delete pending equip skill response

entry.name: PetWaitSkillNewNtf
entry.desc: Pet pending equip skill new info notification

entry.name: PetWaitSkillBuyReq
entry.desc: Pet pending equip skill buy request

entry.name: PetWaitSkillBuyRsp
entry.desc: Pet pending equip skill buy response

entry.name: PetWaitSkillClearReq
entry.desc: Pet clear pending equip skill request

entry.name: PetWaitSkillClearRsp
entry.desc: Pet clear pending equip skill response

entry.name: MailLoginRes
entry.desc: Unread mail reminder after role login

entry.name: GuildMatchGiveUpReq
entry.desc: Guild war sign up cancel request

entry.name: GuildMatchGiveUpRsp
entry.desc: Guild war sign up cancel response

entry.name: GuildMatchSignUpAgreeReq
entry.desc: Guild war sign up confirm request

entry.name: GuildMatchSignUpAgreeRsp
entry.desc: Guild war sign up confirm response

entry.name: GuildMatchQualifierResultAdd
entry.desc: Guild war qualifier ranking list add

entry.name: GuildMatchQualifierResultDel
entry.desc: Guild war qualifier ranking list delete

entry.name: GuildMatchQualifierFirstNtf
entry.desc: Guild war qualifier first place notification

entry.name: GuildMatchPairListNtf
entry.desc: Guild war knockout round matchup list

entry.name: GuildMatchPairEnterErrNtf
entry.desc: Guild war knockout enter failed notification

entry.name: RoomInitInfo
entry.desc: When player enters BS, resend necessary room info

entry.name: GuildGetGuildStatusReq
entry.desc: Guild war get guild intel request

entry.name: GuildGetGuildStatusRsp
entry.desc: Guild war get guild intel response

entry.name: GuildGetCommerceBoatStatusReq
entry.desc: Guild war get ship intel request

entry.name: GuildGetCommerceBoatStatusRsp
entry.desc: Guild war get ship intel response

entry.name: GuildCommerceBoatStatusNtf
entry.desc: Guild war ship info change notification

entry.name: GuildWarGuildCommerceNtf
entry.desc: Guild war commerce resource change notification

entry.name: GuildWarSimpleGuildInfoReq
entry.desc: Get guild info with only id and name request

entry.name: GuildWarSimpleGuildInfoRsp
entry.desc: Get guild info with only id and name response

entry.name: GuildWarAllInformationNtf
entry.desc: Sync all guild war scout info

entry.name: NpcAtdValueInfoNtf
entry.desc: NPC group affection value update notification

entry.name: NpcAtdGiveGiftReq
entry.desc: NPC group affection give gift request

entry.name: NpcAtdGiveGiftRsp
entry.desc: NPC group affection give gift response

entry.name: CatCuisineRemainsNtf
entry.desc: Cat cuisine remaining count and effect notification

entry.name: CatCuisineUnlockStateChangeReq
entry.desc: Cat cuisine unlock state change request

entry.name: CatCuisineUnlockStateChangeRsp
entry.desc: Cat cuisine unlock state change response
